## reentrancy-balance
Impact: High
Confidence: Medium
 - [ ] ID-17
Reentrancy in [sDGNRS._submitGamblingClaimFrom(address,address,uint256)](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1027-L1150):
	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [coinBacking = coinflip.redeemableFlipBacking()](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1082)
	Balance read before the call:
	- [stethBal = steth.balanceOf(address(this))](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1072)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [claim.ethValueOwed + ethValueOwed > MAX_DAILY_REDEMPTION_EV](contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1137)
		- stale variable `ethValueOwed`

contracts/sDGNRS.sol#L1027-L1150

	External call allowing reentrancy:
	- [gamePlayer.claimWinnings(address(this))](contracts/DegenerusVault.sol#L814)
	Balance read before the call:
	- [(ethBal,stBal,combined) = _syncEthReserves()](contracts/DegenerusVault.sol#L804)
	Possible stale balance used after the call in a condition:
	- [stEthOut > stBal](contracts/DegenerusVault.sol#L824)
		- stale variable `stEthOut`
